name: Ladder
description: An outcome ladder with ●/○ rung marks. A rung lights only when it has an evidence URL; unlit is the honest default.

rungs.type: Array<{ name: string; lit?: boolean; evidence_url?: string; key?: string; description?: string }>
rungs.description: Ordered outcome rungs. `lit` is honored only when `evidence_url` is also present.

start.description: Short mono label above the ladder.

rules: A rung lights ONLY with an evidence URL.
Leave rungs unlit by default; unlit is the honest state.
Use for outcome/proof progression, not generic timelines.
